subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Hasan! In these days the fire of tyranny hath been kindled by the hand of the oppressor, and the pure blood of a company of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسن این ایام نار ظلم بید ظالم برافروخته شد و دماء مطهره جمعی از
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @chastisement and requital, @justice and wrath of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment
